items.body: As the isolation period comes to an end for those caught up in the outbreak on a cruise ship, let’s celebrate a good news story British passengers from the MV Hondius cruise ship where the hantavirus outbreak first occurred will finish their isolation periods next Monday. This is a public health success story worth…
